LanguageData.Ammo_20x138mmB_AP.label: 20x138mmB (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_20x138mmB_AP.description: A medium caliber cartridge used by autocannons and a handful of anti-tank rifles.
LanguageData.Ammo_20x138mmB_Incendiary.label: 20x138mmB (AP-I)
LanguageData.Ammo_20x138mmB_Incendiary.description: A medium caliber cartridge used by autocannons and a handful of anti-tank rifles.
LanguageData.Ammo_20x138mmB_HE.label: 20x138mmB (AP-HE)
LanguageData.Ammo_20x138mmB_HE.description: A medium caliber cartridge used by autocannons and a handful of anti-tank rifles.
LanguageData.Ammo_20x138mmB_Sabot.label: 20x138mmB (Sabot)
LanguageData.Ammo_20x138mmB_Sabot.description: A medium caliber cartridge used by autocannons and a handful of anti-tank rifles.
LanguageData.Bullet_20x138mmB_AP.label: 20x138mmB bullet (AP)
LanguageData.Bullet_20x138mmB_Incendiary.label: 20x138mmB bullet (AP-I)
LanguageData.Bullet_20x138mmB_HE.label: 20x138mmB bullet (AP-HE)
